category_title: Students with autism using typed communication and requiring extended processing time
minimal_context: Shaffer is sitting in the front row of his calculus class while the teacher asks questions during whole-class instruction.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the next calculus question on the board. What is the solution?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits as a silent young man in the front row staring straight ahead, tapping his thumbs together.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Anyone can answer. Just yell out what you got.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Begins to type his answer, but his typing is much slower compared to students yelling out answers.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I heard the correct answer over there. Let's move on to the next problem.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly next to an adult who took notes for him, unable to get an answer in and looking like he is unable to participate.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the next calculus question on the board. What is the solution?

STUDENT: (Sits as a silent young man in the front row staring straight ahead, tapping his thumbs together.)

TUTOR: Anyone can answer. Just yell out what you got.

STUDENT: (Begins to type his answer, but his typing is much slower compared to students yelling out answers.)

TUTOR: I heard the correct answer over there. Let's move on to the next problem.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly next to an adult who took notes for him, unable to get an answer in and looking like he is unable to participate.)

context.social_setting: whole-class instruction, sitting quietly next to an adult who took notes for him

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: teacher asked questions and lets them yell out their answers
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: typing was much slower compared to students yelling out answers; so, he looked like he was unable to participate, sitting quietly
related_quotes: She lets them yell out their answers, so Shaffer can’t ever really get one in.

behavior_patterns.condition: sitting in the front row during Calculus and Science classes
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: silent young man in the front row staring straight ahead, tapping his thumbs together
